title: End of Minecraft
description: Adds a new wasteland world preset to live out your wasteland fantasies!
body:
## Features:
The end of Minecraft has come! The world is left a scorched wasteland after an apocalypse, leaving only dead bushes, dead tree, and the occasional structure. Food is scarce. The world is full of enemies. And when the rain comes, so does a hit of radiation. Your only hope: a compass. Found only in the rubble of an abandon structure, the compass, with a left click, will lead you to salvation. The only question is, can you scavenge enough to make the trek through the Anomaly to find Planet Alpha, the last hope of Minecraft?

### New World Preset:
There are features that will work in the standard world, however the mod is indented to be played in the "End of Minecraft" preset. Some features will not work/may be broken in the standard world.

### Anomalies:
Based on the Series "the 100," the goal is to find the Anomaly Stone to find your way to a new world.
